summary: Horizontal video. A re-posted Fox News clip about the murder of Sheridan Gorman. It includes man-on-the-street interviews with Chicago students, a Gorman family statement card, and Fox News alert lower-thirds. It is a TV news segment with no music track.
notable_text: On-screen: 'TODAY: ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT SUSPECTED OF MURDERING SHERIDAN GORMAN MAKES FIRST COURT APPEARANCE' / 'FOX NEWS ALERT'.
